metadata.name: mind_voyager_generalized_topic_graph
metadata.description: Generalized CBT-oriented topic ontology for therapy dialogue retrieval, covering shared topic domains, belief clusters, intermediate beliefs, coping styles, emotional themes, behavior patterns, and prompt types.

nodes.label: Abandonment
nodes.description: Expectation of being left, dropped, or emotionally deserted.

nodes.label: Action Readiness
prompt_templates: What feels like one small step you might be willing to try?
What feels most realistic to experiment with before we talk again?

nodes.label: Activity Scheduling
nodes.description: Using structured pleasant or mastery activities adaptively.

nodes.label: Addiction
nodes.description: Substance use, relapse risk, craving, and escape behavior.

nodes.label: Anger
nodes.description: Frustration, resentment, irritation, or rage.

nodes.label: Anxiety
nodes.description: Fear, worry, dread, or threat sensitivity.

nodes.label: Appeasement
nodes.description: Complying or softening to reduce risk of conflict or rejection.

nodes.label: Avoidance
nodes.description: Staying away from people, places, feelings, or tasks.

nodes.label: Avoidance Rule
nodes.description: Rule that avoidance is necessary to stay safe or cope.

nodes.label: Belief Elicitation
prompt_templates: When this happens, what do you start believing about yourself?
What does this seem to say about you deep down?

nodes.label: Checking Monitoring
nodes.description: Monitoring for danger, mistakes, or reassurance.

nodes.label: Conflict Avoidance
nodes.description: Avoiding confrontation, disagreement, or emotionally charged exchange.

nodes.label: Control Rule
nodes.description: Rule that strict control is necessary to prevent collapse or harm.

nodes.label: Coping
nodes.description: Patterns used to manage distress, control exposure, or regulate feelings.

nodes.label: Coping Exploration
prompt_templates: How do you usually get through that moment?
What do you tend to do to protect yourself when this shows up?

nodes.label: Cost Of Status Quo
prompt_templates: What worries you most about staying in this pattern?
If nothing changed here, what would concern you most?

nodes.label: Danger
nodes.description: Sense that the world or other people are unsafe or threatening.

nodes.label: Defectiveness
nodes.description: Sense of being damaged, broken, toxic, or fundamentally flawed.

nodes.label: Dependency Rule
nodes.description: Assumption that one cannot cope alone and must depend on others.

nodes.label: Discrepancy Elicitation
prompt_templates: What is this pattern helping with, and what is it costing you?
What part of this no longer fits with the life you want?

nodes.label: Economy
nodes.description: Financial hardship, dependency, debt, compensation, and treatment-related costs.

nodes.label: Education
nodes.description: School-based stress, academic experiences, peer dynamics, and exclusion.

nodes.label: Emotion Exploration
prompt_templates: What feels hardest about this for you right now?
What emotions show up most strongly when this happens?

nodes.label: Emotional Control
nodes.description: Trying to tightly regulate affect or vulnerability.

nodes.label: Emotional Inhibition Rule
nodes.description: Assumption that emotions should be hidden or shut down.

nodes.label: Emotional Withdrawal
nodes.description: Pulling back affectively while staying physically present.

nodes.label: Escape
nodes.description: Using distraction, fantasy, or numbing to leave distress.

nodes.label: Failure Identity
nodes.description: Identity-level conviction of being a failure or loser.

nodes.label: Family
nodes.description: Family relationships, attachment experiences, roles, and conflict.

nodes.label: Fear
nodes.description: Immediate threat, alarm, or acute vulnerability.

nodes.label: Future Projection
prompt_templates: If things improved even a little, what would look different?
What would you hope to be doing more of if this felt less powerful?

nodes.label: Guilt
nodes.description: Self-blame, remorse, or moral distress.

nodes.label: Health
nodes.description: Physical health, body-related concerns, illness, and medical stress.

nodes.label: Help Seeking
nodes.description: Turning toward others for support or guidance.

nodes.label: Helplessness
nodes.description: Sense of weakness, incompetence, entrapment, or inability to cope.

nodes.label: History Linking
prompt_templates: Does this feeling or pattern seem familiar from earlier in your life?
Have there been earlier experiences that made this feel especially sensitive?

nodes.label: Hopelessness
nodes.description: Defeat, futility, or no-way-out despair.

nodes.label: Hopelessness Rule
nodes.description: Assumption that change is futile or effort will fail.

nodes.label: Housing/Home
nodes.description: Living situation, moving, domestic stress, household duties, and home stability.

nodes.label: Identity
nodes.description: Self-worth, sexuality, belonging, competence, independence, values, and growth.

nodes.label: Irritability
nodes.description: Low frustration tolerance, agitation, or touchiness.

nodes.label: Isolation
nodes.description: Reducing contact and closing off from support or closeness.

nodes.label: Law
nodes.description: Legal pressure, custody conflict, and fear of institutions or punishment.

nodes.label: Loneliness
nodes.description: Isolation, disconnection, or unmet attachment need.

nodes.label: Loss
nodes.description: Bereavement, separation, rupture, and meaningful losses.

nodes.label: Loss Of Control
nodes.description: Belief that urges, emotions, or behavior cannot be contained.

nodes.label: Meaning Exploration
prompt_templates: What does that seem to mean about you or your situation?
What feels most painful or important about that experience?

nodes.label: Mental Health
nodes.description: Psychological symptoms, emotional regulation, therapy, and psychiatric treatment.

nodes.label: Mistrust
nodes.description: Expectation that others will exploit, betray, or harm.

nodes.label: Mistrust Rule
nodes.description: Assumption that closeness leads to harm or betrayal.

nodes.label: Numbness
nodes.description: Disconnection, shutdown, or emotional absence.

nodes.label: Overplanning
nodes.description: Relying on planning or preparation to reduce uncertainty.

nodes.label: Overresponsibility Rule
nodes.description: Assumption that one must manage others or prevent bad outcomes.

nodes.label: Overworking
nodes.description: Working excessively to escape distress or prove worth.

nodes.label: People Pleasing
nodes.description: Appeasing or adapting to maintain acceptance or reduce conflict.

nodes.label: Perfectionism Rule
nodes.description: Rule that mistakes or imperfection are intolerable.

nodes.label: Procrastination
nodes.description: Delaying because of fear, shame, or overwhelm.

nodes.label: Reassurance Loop
nodes.description: Repeatedly seeking confirmation or checking closeness.

nodes.label: Reassurance Seeking
nodes.description: Seeking external confirmation to regulate insecurity.

nodes.label: Rejection Rule
nodes.description: Conditional belief that authenticity or neediness leads to rejection.

nodes.label: Relapse Behavior
nodes.description: Returning to addictive or high-risk coping patterns.

nodes.label: Relationships
nodes.description: Romantic and interpersonal closeness, trust, rejection, and intimacy.

nodes.label: Routine Control
nodes.description: Using rigid routines or structure to create safety.

nodes.label: Rumination
nodes.description: Repetitive mental reviewing, replaying, or analysis.

nodes.label: Sadness
nodes.description: Loss, grief, low mood, or discouragement.

nodes.label: Safety
nodes.description: Threat sensitivity, hypervigilance, and fear of danger or collapse.

nodes.label: Safety Behaviors
nodes.description: Using protective behaviors to reduce perceived threat.

nodes.label: Self Attack
nodes.description: Using harsh self-criticism as a control or motivational strategy.

nodes.label: Self Attacking Behavior
nodes.description: Behaviorally reinforcing self-criticism, punishment, or harsh self-treatment.

nodes.label: Self Silencing Rule
nodes.description: Rule to hide needs, feelings, or identity to protect attachment.

nodes.label: Shame
nodes.description: Humiliation, exposure, self-conscious pain, or defectiveness.

nodes.label: Shame Identity
nodes.description: Identity-level experience of being exposed as inadequate or bad.

nodes.label: Social Avoidance
nodes.description: Avoiding exposure, gatherings, or interpersonal risk.

nodes.label: Social Life
nodes.description: Friendships, groups, community, roommates, peer rejection, and social isolation.

nodes.label: Strengths Exceptions
prompt_templates: Have there been moments when this felt even a little easier to handle?
What has helped you resist or step out of this pattern before?

nodes.label: Substance Use Coping
nodes.description: Using substances to alter mood, avoid pain, or escape.

nodes.label: Suppression
nodes.description: Pushing thoughts, needs, or feelings down.

nodes.label: Thought Elicitation
prompt_templates: What goes through your mind in that moment?
What do you find yourself telling yourself when this comes up?

nodes.label: Trauma
nodes.description: Victimization, unsafe experiences, humiliation, and trauma-related vulnerability.

nodes.label: Unlovability
nodes.description: Sense of being rejected, unwanted, alone, or impossible to love.

nodes.label: Values Elicitation
prompt_templates: What kind of person do you want to be in moments like this?
What matters to you that this problem gets in the way of?

nodes.label: Withdrawal
nodes.description: Pulling back from contact, support, or engagement.

nodes.label: Work
nodes.description: Employment, performance, role demands, and occupational stress.

nodes.label: Worthlessness
nodes.description: Sense of having no value, goodness, or right to matter.
